specs.title: cp-000: Opens from toolbar button anchored to button position
cp-001: Search bar with live filtering Search blocks
cp-002: Blocks organized by category Content Media Academic
cp-003: Category headers shown
cp-004: Keyboard navigation Arrow UpDown to move Enter to insert
cp-005: Escape closes the menu
cp-006: Click outside closes the menu
cp-007: Shape block shows expandable submenu with shape grid 4 columns
cp-008: Shape categories geometric shapes grouped by type
cp-009: AI Visualize button sparkle icon for diagram infographic chart types
cp-010: Empty state No blocks found when search yields no results
cp-011: inserter button on the canvas for quick block insertion
cp-012: Inserts block at a default position on the slide
cp-013: Uses createDefaultBlock factory with type-specific defaults
cp-014: Two tabs Design and Animation
cp-015: Switching tabs shows the corresponding section
cp-016: Shows Align selected block to canvas controls
cp-017: 6 alignment buttons Left Center Right Top Middle Bottom
cp-018: Rotation controls
cp-019: Numeric input 0360 degrees
cp-020: Quick-set buttons 0 90 180 270
cp-021: Flip Horizontal button
cp-022: Flip Vertical button
cp-023: Shows count of selected blocks eg 3 blocks selected
cp-024: Delete All button reddanger
cp-025: Align 6 buttons Left Center Right Top Middle Bottom
cp-026: Distribute Horizontal and Vertical disabled if 3 blocks
cp-027: Shown when exactly one non-text block is selected
cp-028: BlockPropertyEditor renders type-specific controls
cp-029: Properties vary by block type chart data image URL code language etc
cp-030: Background Type toggle Solid Gradient Image
cp-031: Solid Color picker with theme color swatches
cp-032: Gradient Gradient editor with
cp-033: Type selector linear
cp-034: Angle control
